---
title: "Introduction to R"
author: "Vlada"
date: "2026-07-22"
output: html_document
---


# Practice Assignment 1

This R Markdown document demonstrates how to print the integers from 1 to 10 using R.

## R code

The following loop prints each integer from 1 to 10.

```{r}

for (number in 1:10) {

  print(number)

}

```
